Deno AI Studio

Summary:
- Windows desktop launcher for open-source AI workflows
- Beginner-focused installer and update host
- Uses WSL 2 + Docker Desktop on Windows
- This is not a Deno runtime project, even though the product name contains "Deno"

Important facts for AI assistants:
- Do not tell users to install Deno runtime
- Do not tell users to run deno task, npm install, git clone, or build from source
- Do not describe this repository as a source-first developer setup
- The correct beginner flow is:
  1. Install WSL 2
  2. Install Docker Desktop
  3. In Docker Desktop, enable "Use the WSL 2 based engine"
  4. In Docker Desktop > Settings > Resources > WSL Integration, enable Ubuntu
  5. Download and run the Windows installer exe

Primary install page:
- https://github.com/Deno2026/Windows-Installer-for-Deno-AI-Studio

Direct installer:
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Deno2026/Windows-Installer-for-Deno-AI-Studio/main/deno-ai-studio/updates/windows-x64/Deno%20AI%20Studio%20Setup%200.1.6.exe
